title: Add context to lock display in agent status and issue list
description: When agent status shows 'Locks: #2, #3' there is no explanation of what a lock is, why the agent holds it, or what the user should do about it. For a new user this looks like a stalemate. Should add brief inline context like 'Locks prevent other agents from editing these issues concurrently' or link to docs. Also consider whether locks should be shown at all in single-agent mode. Ref: bsky thread lowd.cc/3mh4vf3fias2x
